fact_nuggets.text: Defeatist (Japanese: Timid) is an Ability introduced in Generation V. It is the signature Ability of Archen and Archeops.
Signature Ability of Archen And Archeops

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI When its HP is half or lower, the Pokemon does less damage. * When the Pokemon's HP is down to half or lower, its moves do less damage! * S MD When the Pokemon's HP is down to half or lower, the Pokemon's moves do less damage!

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Defeatist halves the user's Attack and Special Attack stats when their HP is equal to or less than half of its maximum. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Defeatist has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] Defeatist halves the user's Attack and Special Attack stats when their HP is equal to or less than half of its maximum.
Halves Attack and Special Attack at 50% max HP or less.
